basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.short_information: ANGRAU is recruiting 1 Teaching Associate on contract basis for 11 months.

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | Ph.D. in relevant subject OR Master’s degree in Food Engineering / Food Process Engineering / Dairy & Food Engineering / Agricultural Process & Food Engineering / Post Harvest Engineering with at least 55% marks AND Bachelor’s degree (4/5 years) in Food Technology / Agricultural Engineering with first division Minimum 3 years teaching/research experience Published one research paper in SCI / NAAS rated ≥4.0 journal | Upper Age Limit: 40 years (Men), 45 years (Women)

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 01 Post: Teaching Associate (Full Time) in Department of Food Process Engineering

how_to_apply: Attend the walk-in interview on 23-07-2026 at 10:30 AM.
Bring all original credentials and one set of bio-data with Xerox copies.
Carry two recent passport size photographs.
important_instructions: The engagement is purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular appointment or further continuation. No TA/DA will be paid. Concealing facts or canvassing will lead to disqualification. The Associate Dean reserves the right to cancel/postpone the interview.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: College of Food Technology, Pulivendula, Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University invites applications for Teaching Associate (Full Time) on contract basis in the Department of Food Process Engineering. Download Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ANGRAU is recruiting 1 Teaching Associate on contract basis for 11 months.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total Posts: 01 Post: Teaching Associate (Full Time) in Department of Food Process Engineering

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: Ph.D. in relevant subject OR Master’s degree in Food Engineering / Food Process Engineering / Dairy & Food Engineering / Agricultural Process & Food Engineering / Post Harvest Engineering with at least 55% marks AND Bachelor’s degree (4/5 years) in Food Technology / Agricultural Engineering with first division Minimum 3 years teaching/research experience Published one research paper in SCI / NAAS rated ≥4.0 journal Upper Age Limit: 40 years (Men), 45 years (Women)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ANGRAU Teaching Associate 2026
content_sections.text: Attend the walk-in interview on 23-07-2026 at 10:30 AM. Bring all original credentials and one set of bio-data with Xerox copies. Carry two recent passport size photographs.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ANGRAU Teaching Associate Candidates
content_sections.text: The engagement is purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular appointment or further continuation. No TA/DA will be paid. Concealing facts or canvassing will lead to disqualification. The Associate Dean reserves the right to cancel/postpone the interview.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Teaching Associate Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ANGRAU Teaching Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled on 23 July 2026 at 10:30 AM at College of Food Technology, Pulivendula.

faq.question: Q2. How many Teaching Associate posts are available at ANGRAU Pulivendula?
faq.answer: Only 1 post in the Department of Food Process Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Teaching Associate at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: ₹61,000/- + HRA for Master’s holders and ₹67,000/- + HRA for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for ANGRAU Teaching Associate?
faq.answer: Ph.D. or Master’s degree with 55% marks + Bachelor’s degree + 3 years experience + one SCI/NAAS paper.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Teaching Associate contract at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: 11 months from the date of joining or till regular post is filled, whichever is earlier.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I bring for ANGRAU walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Original credentials, bio-data, Xerox copies of certificates, and two passport size photographs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the upper age limit for Teaching Associate at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: 40 years for Men and 45 years for Women.

faq.question: Q8. Is the ANGRAU Teaching Associate position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the interview venue for ANGRAU Pulivendula recruitment?
faq.answer: College of Food Technology, Pulivendula, YSR District, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for the ANGRAU Teaching Associate interview?
faq.answer: No, no TA/DA will be given to candidates appearing for the interview.
